data.title: Add comprehensive testing suite
data.description:
**Labels:** `testing`, `ci/cd`

**Description:**
Add unit tests, integration tests, and E2E tests for reliability.

**Proposed Solution:**
Set up testing infrastructure with Vitest and Playwright.

**Test Coverage:**

* Unit tests for utility functions
* Integration tests for API endpoints
* E2E tests for user flows
* Visual regression tests
* Load testing for Workers

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] Unit tests for core functions (>80% coverage)
- [ ] Integration tests for all API endpoints
- [ ] E2E tests for critical user flows
- [ ] Tests run in CI/CD pipeline
- [ ] Coverage reporting

**Technical Considerations:**

* Vitest already configured (use it!)
* Add @cloudflare/vitest-pool-workers tests
* Add Playwright for E2E tests
* Set up test fixtures and mocks
* Add test scripts to package.json
* Integrate with GitHub Actions

**Effort & Value Ranking:**

* ⏱️ Time: **High** (comprehensive coverage across unit, integration, E2E tests)
* 🧩 Complexity: **Medium-High** (test infrastructure, mocking strategies, CI integration)
* 💎 Value: **High** (essential for long-term maintainability, prevents regressions, enables confident refactoring)
